hero.title: Sokołek Studio
hero.subtitle: Technology for the people.
hero.description: We are an independent technology studio from Poznań, bringing engineering and creativity together. We help companies implement artificial intelligence where it genuinely makes work easier, organises knowledge and supports the growth of their teams. We design with intention - from the first idea and prototype to a finished system, brand and website. We believe in technology that matters and makes everyday work easier.

services.label: Services
services.heading: Small studio. Full attention.
services.description: Your brand, website, technology and communication should all speak with one voice. That is why we look at your business as a whole and shape the scope around what it genuinely needs - from the first idea to a solution ready for everyday use.

items.title: AI Audit & Strategy
items.description: We help identify where AI genuinely makes sense. We look at your processes, knowledge and business goals, then organise the ideas, choose the most valuable directions and prepare a practical implementation roadmap.

items.title: AI Implementation
items.description: We create tools that simplify working with documents, knowledge and repetitive processes. We design them from the ground up - from the prototype and integrations to a secure system ready for everyday use.

items.title: Digital Foundation
items.description: Build your brand with us from the ground up - from positioning and visual identity to a website and one key AI implementation. We bring everything together into a coherent digital foundation that supports the future growth of your business.

items.title: Brand & Web
items.description: We design refined brands, websites and digital products that look and sound like your business. From strategy and visual identity to UX/UI, development and the language of your communication.

targetAudience.label: Who we help
targetAudience.heading: For businesses that want to grow thoughtfully.
targetAudience.description: We work best with companies that manage a great deal of knowledge, documentation and repetitive work, but do not want to introduce technology simply for the sake of it. We look for solutions that genuinely improve everyday work and support the growth of the team.

items.title: Working with documents takes too much time
items.description: The team spends its time searching, comparing and rewriting information instead of applying its knowledge to clients, projects and important decisions.

items.title: Knowledge is scattered across people and tools
items.description: Important information is buried in emails, files, conversations and the minds of a few people, making it difficult to find, share and use effectively.

items.title: Repetitive processes are holding back growth
items.description: The business is growing, but some of the work still requires manual supervision, copying data and repeating the same steps with every new project.

items.title: The business needs a new digital foundation
items.description: The brand, website, communication and existing tools are no longer keeping pace with where the company is heading or the experience its clients and team expect.

process.label: Process
process.heading: From an idea to a working solution.
process.description: We begin by understanding what you genuinely need. Then we test the idea on a smaller scale before building a solution that can work reliably within the everyday rhythm of your business.

items.title: Discovery
items.description: We get to know the business, its people, data and processes. We look for the place where technology can create real value.

items.title: Prototype
items.description: We test the most important assumptions within a focused, clearly defined scope before the solution grows to production scale.

items.title: Implementation
items.description: We build the system, connect it with your existing tools and take care of usability, security and reliable operation.

items.title: Growth
items.description: We observe how the solution performs in practice, develop it further and adapt it to the changing needs of the business and its team.

philosophy.label: Our approach
philosophy.heading: AI where it makes sense.
philosophy.description: We demystify artificial intelligence, using it responsibly and only where it is genuinely needed. We do not treat AI as a goal in itself or as a simple way to replace people. We design solutions that remove mechanical work from teams, organise knowledge and support better decision-making. This gives people more time for work that requires experience, creativity, responsibility and human relationships.

engineeringFoundation.label: Engineering foundation
engineeringFoundation.note: Selected professional experience of the studio's co-founder.
engineeringFoundation.heading: Experience you can rely on.
engineeringFoundation.description: Maksymilian leads the technology side of Sokołek Studio. He is a senior software engineer with more than six years of experience building AI systems, web applications and cloud architecture. He has designed and implemented solutions ranging from early prototypes to production systems for startups and global companies across the medical, chemical, advertising, semiconductor and financial sectors.

pillars.title: AI platform for medical documentation
pillars.outcome: Designing and building an application for working with medical documentation and knowledge from the ground up - from cloud architecture and AI model integrations to the user interface and deployment process.

pillars.title: AI agent system for the advertising industry
pillars.outcome: Building an agent-based system that plans and executes multi-stage tasks, works with different AI models and passes structured results between services.

pillars.title: MLOps infrastructure for the semiconductor industry
pillars.outcome: Designing and implementing a production MLOps environment based on Kubernetes, standardising work with machine-learning models and improving their development and deployment across a global engineering organisation.

pillars.title: Data architecture for the banking sector
pillars.outcome: Building data systems that analysed information and supported the maintenance of a global ATM infrastructure.

pillars.title: Knowledge platform for the chemical industry
pillars.outcome: Designing a platform that processed approximately 100,000 technical PDF documents, organised the information they contained and prepared it for search and use by AI-powered tools.

portfolio.label: Work
portfolio.heading: Work with rhythm, purpose and character.
portfolio.intro: We do not collect random projects. We show work where strategy, technology, imagery and language move together.

dogTok.title: DOG TOK
dogTok.subtitle: DOG TOK - Training Paradise
dogTok.summary: We transformed DOG TOK's extensive offer into a simple and intuitive structure. We designed a website that captures the atmosphere of the place, makes essential information easy to find and guides visitors through workshops, camps, accommodation and the event schedule.
dogTok.imageAlt: DOG TOK - Training Paradise website designed and developed by Sokołek Studio

midPageCta.label: Next step
midPageCta.heading: You do not need a finished idea. We will help you find one.
midPageCta.description: Have a challenge, but not a finished brief? Tell us. We will help name the problem, find the direction and decide what is actually worth building.

sectionOne.heading: A little about us
sectionOne.description: Maksymilian leads the technology side of the studio. He has spent years building software and AI systems for startups and large organisations. He combines a strong engineering background with a genuine curiosity for new technologies, but never introduces them simply for effect. He values straightforward solutions, clean code and projects refined down to the smallest detail.

sectionTwo.description: Klaudia leads the creative side of the studio. She combines experience in PR and communication with UX, photography, editing and social media. She has a strong eye for imagery, an instinct for emerging trends and a talent for translating both a brand's character and complex technology into simple, natural language. She makes sure the final result is coherent, useful and simply looks good.

openScope.heading: We work across the full digital layer.
openScope.description: If you did not find exactly what you were looking for on our website, but you would still like to work with us, write to us. We are sure we will find a shared language.

contact.description: Tell us about your business, situation or challenge. We will help name the problem, find a practical direction and explore where AI, technology or communication can genuinely make work easier.
contact.secondaryDescription: We can also build a new brand, website or complete Digital Foundation for you, bringing design, technology and communication together into one coherent solution.

cookieConsent.label: Cookies
cookieConsent.heading: We use analytics cookies.
cookieConsent.description: We use Google Analytics to better understand how visitors use our website and how we can improve it.
